scope: local development, WorkerTemplate validation and plan only

resource_contract.template_chain: WorkerTemplate.spec.toolRefs[role] -> ToolBinding.spec.modelRef -> ModelBinding.spec.resourceId -> AI model resource
resource_contract.selection_result: No selectable resource satisfies doubao + video + video-generation.

browser.template_plan_before_fix: /spec: Worker template contains an invalid field.
browser.template_plan_after_fix: /spec/toolModelResourceIds/seedance-video: Worker template contains an invalid field.

corrected_defect.root_cause: workerIssuePath rejected the valid hyphenated tool role seedance-video and collapsed its path to /spec.
corrected_defect.code_change: worker_creation_compiler.go now permits hyphens in identifier path segments.

next_authorized_action: Configure an organization-scoped Doubao connection with a named non-production API key, create a Seedance video-generation model resource, create its ModelBinding and ToolBinding, then repeat template plan, apply, Worker launch, terminal, and cleanup verification.
conclusion: Seedance Expert has a live image and connected Runner through the shared DoAgent runtime, and its required tool-model contract is enforced. It is not supported: the required Doubao video resource and ToolBinding are absent, no provider credential was read, and no Worker or Pod was created.
